parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ $('Initialize Session').first().json.script || 'Cardiología, fisiología, sistema renina-angiotensina-aldosterona, hipertensión, electrocardiograma, presión arterial, riñón, corazón.' }}

parameters.query: SELECT source, asset_id FROM asset_usage WHERE status IN ('reserved', 'used');

INSERT INTO asset_usage (source, asset_id, asset_type, asset_url, used_in_reel, status, topic, reserved_at)
SELECT s.source, s.asset_id, s.asset_type, s.asset_url, $1, 'reserved', $2, NOW()
FROM jsonb_to_recordset($3::jsonb) AS s(source text, asset_id text, asset_type text, asset_url text)
ON CONFLICT (source, asset_id) DO NOTHING;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $json.session_id }}, {{ $json.topic || '' }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.segments.map(s => ({source: s.asset.source, asset_id: s.asset.asset_id, asset_type: s.asset.type, asset_url: s.asset.url}))) }}
